description: Trade Me is a New Zealand online marketplace with listings and services across categories such as marketplace, jobs, property, and motors. Its developer site documents programmatic access to Trade Me data and account actions through a REST API.
summary: trademe.co.nz exposes one documented REST API at https://api.trademe.co.nz, primarily OAuth-protected, with a documented unauthenticated public catalogue subset; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surfaced in the docs.
